rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DONALD M. WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Final Account For Resigning Conservator
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. Conservatorship Issues 1) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham liquidated conservatee's IRA without court authority. 2) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham paid for trust assets from conservatorship assets without court authority. 3) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham alleges $2,455.00 in payments were made in error and Daniel Cunningham has agreed to reduce his fee request by the payments made in error. There is a duplicate payment to Great Call of $143.99 and Daniel Cunningham will reduce his fees in that amount. 4) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham is requesting $78,778.50 in fees as former conservator $56,869.51 is remaining compensation due after fees on account. 5) Attorney is requesting $64,603.75 in fees and $1,739.66 in costs. 6) Professional fiduciary Daniel Cunningham is requesting re-approve the 3,156.878 shares of Franklin California Tax Free Income Fund Class A.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANITA SILVERS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if the executor's report for the period 3/14/2019 - 10/31/2020 should be approved and if all relief requested in the petition should be granted. 1) Two supplements to the petition were not signed and verified by the executor. [Prob. C. Sect. 1023 and CRC 7.103(c).] 2) As noted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 3/22/21, Probate Code Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary has previously been confined 3) Neither paragraph 14 of the attorney's fee declaration nor paragraph 7 of the attorney's second supplement fully addresses whether Dialyz Morales-Guerrero meets the requirements of Bus. & Prof. C. Sect. 6450. This disclosure was made in the fee declaration regarding two other paralegals, but not Ms. Morales-Guerrero. It is not clear who a couple of other billing parties mentioned in the fee declaration are, whether they are attorneys or paralegals qualified to bill. 4) Exhibit E to the attorney's second supplement still does not provide adequate detail of the costs advanced (to indicate what was filed or delivered) for the Court to determine if such costs are all accurate and warranted. For example, the filing fee for the original petition was $450, not $577.50. "Court Service" is not a sufficient description. (Notice sent by overnight express to the minor children of the sole beneficiary, who are not interested parties, and to the executor, who is not required to give notice to himself, seems like the kind of cost that would not be reasonable.) 5) The address of the real property should probably be 15 Otsego Avenue, not Ostego. 6) No revised proposed order has been submitted that sets forth specific asets to be distributed. (There was no need for a "sole sibling" to waive an accounting. In addition to being the executor himself, he is not entitled to an accounting; only the sole beneficiary was.) Due to the COVID-19 emergency, counsel and parties must appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order on the court's website for information on appearing remotely. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 875 8017 7925 and password is 722809. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LERON DOYLE MCGOWAN JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. order revised to require distribution to walter mcgowan, trustee of the devisee trust. as previously stated, this court does not order distribuiton directly from a probate estate to a trust benefiiary when the will orders distribution to the trustee. status on filing a receipt from the trustee for the distribution will be set for 7/19/21.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE 2018 JESUS VICINTAYNER ESPINOZA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust; To Determine Property That Belongs To The Estate; And To Determine The Validity Of A Contract To Make A Devise
rulings.Rulings: continued to 7/12/21 (first available date that allows for 30 days notice). Judicial Council form DE-115 is a mandatory form of notice for any petition brought under Probate Code 850 (as of 1/1/20). in addition, the other children of Mr. Espinoza are heirs, not trust beneficiaries, and service is required as for service of a summons (PC 851, referring to PC 17203(b)), since they are persons whose interests are affected by the petition. finally, the court requires a copy of the objections (with exhibits) be mailed to all of the Trustor's children directly. deadline to file the required documents is noon on 7/1/21. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subjec to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HENRY KWAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/7/21. (No earlier availability.) Examiner Notes (issues necessitating continuance): The will is pour-over will to the Kwan Family Trust. An amendment was filed on 4/21/21 but no proof of service of notice of the amendment has been filed. [CRC 7.53(a).] The wrong form of Notice of Hearing was given of this Spousal Property Petition, which is not a petition under Probate Code Section 850. Item 2 of the petition has both a. and b. checked, which does not make sense. Item 10 of the petition was not answered. Guardians ad litem may need to be appointed to protect the interests of the minors. The verification of the petition is incomplete. It appears that a formal estate must be opened, as a Spousal Property Petition cannot be used in this case. If the petition is not withdrawn by the petitioner, courtesy copies of any responsive papers must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/25/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LYDIA SEGOVIA SAN FELIPPO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/28/2021. The 5/4/2021 Supplement which makes changes the petition must be filed as an amendment or an amended petition. (See CRC 7.3). An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends. (See CRC 7.53). An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/14/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/9/2021 to first available date. 1) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [LRSF 14.18 E.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/1/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL M. KAMINSKY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. Status of closing the estate is set for 11/29/2022.
